contextHint: This is a cryptocurrency exchange or trading platform. Never alter prices, tickers, asset symbols, wallet balances, order forms, leverage/margin data, charts, order books, PnL, or trading controls. Translate only explanatory prose when the user explicitly requests translation.

This is Binance educational, support, blog, or announcement content. Preserve token symbols, chain names, product names, risk warnings, URLs, dates, and numeric values. Translate the article/help prose only.
This page contains software engineering content. Preserve code identifiers, CLI commands, package names, API names, and file paths exactly.
This page is technical documentation. Keep product names, APIs, parameters, code identifiers, and UI labels accurate.

This is Vue/VitePress technical documentation. Preserve Vue API names, component names, directives, file extensions, JavaScript identifiers, HTML tags, and CLI commands. Translate prose in the main document body.
This is Netflix. Translate only subtitle content via the bilingual subtitle overlay. Do not translate the player UI, episode lists, or navigation.
This is a social media feed. Keep usernames (@), hashtags (#), URLs, and emoji untranslated. Only translate the actual post content.
This is a social media / forum page. Preserve usernames, subreddit names, vote counts, timestamps, and platform-specific terms.
This is Hacker News. Preserve usernames, domains, code, and short UI labels. Translate story titles and comment text.
This is a Wikipedia article. Preserve article titles, proper nouns, technical terms, citations, and interwiki links. Translate the main prose content only.
This is a blog/article platform. Preserve author names, publication names, code blocks, and technical terms. Focus on the main article body.
This is a Q&A platform. Preserve usernames, reputation scores, badges, tags, and code blocks. Translate question titles and answer bodies only.
This is an instant messaging platform. Preserve usernames, timestamps, emoji reactions, and message metadata. Translate message text only.
This is a torrent listing/detail page. Preserve release names, file names, hashes, magnet links, sizes, dates, usernames, and numeric stats. Translate the torrent description and user comments.
This is an e-commerce site. Preserve product names, brand names, model numbers, prices, and SKU codes. Do not translate automatically without user action.

This is an Amazon product page. Preserve brand names, model numbers, size/color variants, SKU/ASIN, prices, ratings, stock status, and delivery dates. Translate product title, feature bullets, descriptions, specifications, warnings, and review prose only.

This is a Premium Bandai product page. Preserve product series names, character names, brand names, model names, JAN/SKU codes, release month, scale, materials, dimensions, prices, and preorder dates. Translate product title, descriptions, specifications, warnings, and included-item lists only.
This is a news/media site. Preserve journalist names, publication names, datelines, photo captions, and proper nouns. Translate the main article body only.
This is Instagram. Preserve usernames, hashtags, URLs, emoji, and image alt text. Translate photo captions, comments, and profile bios only.
This is Facebook. Preserve person names, group names, URLs, emoji reactions, and timestamps. Translate feed posts, comments, and article previews only.
This is TikTok. Preserve usernames, hashtags, sound names, and emoji. Translate video captions and creator bios only.
This is Pinterest. Preserve board names, creator names, URLs, and pin titles if they are proper nouns. Translate pin descriptions and comments only.
This is Snapchat web. Preserve usernames, timestamps, and ephemeral context. Translate message text and story captions only.
This is Threads. Preserve usernames, hashtags, URLs, and emoji. Translate thread posts and replies only.
This is Bluesky. Preserve handles, hashtags, URLs, and emoji. Translate posts, profile bios, and thread replies only.

This is Walmart. Preserve product names, model numbers, brand names, prices, ratings, and availability. Translate product title, description, and reviews only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is Target. Preserve product names, model numbers, brand names, prices, and availability. Translate product title, description, and details only when the user explicitly requests translation.

This is Best Buy. Preserve product names, model numbers, brand names, prices, discounts, and availability. Translate product title, description, and specifications only when the user explicitly requests translation.

This is Etsy. Preserve product titles, shop names, materials, dimensions, prices, and personalization options. Translate listing descriptions and reviews only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is a Shopify store. Preserve product names, vendor names, variant names, prices, and SKU. Translate product title, description, and policies only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is SHEIN. Preserve product names, SKUs, sizes, colors, material details, and prices. Translate product descriptions and reviews only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is Temu. Preserve product names, SKUs, specs, prices, coupons, and shipping info. Translate product descriptions and reviews only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is AliExpress. Preserve product names, SKUs, specs, prices, shipping details, and store names. Translate product descriptions and reviews only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is Coursera course content. Preserve course names, instructor names, university names, code snippets, formulas, and quiz answers. Translate lecture descriptions, readings, and discussion text.
This is Udemy course content. Preserve course titles, instructor names, code snippets, and technical terms. Translate course descriptions, curriculum items, and captions only.
This is Khan Academy educational content. Preserve math notation, code snippets, exercise labels, and proper nouns. Translate explanatory prose and article text only.
This is edX course content. Preserve course names, institution names, code snippets, and formulas. Translate course prose, instructions, and readings only.
This is TED. Preserve speaker names, talk titles, URLs, and audience instructions. Translate talk descriptions and transcripts only.

This is Duolingo. Preserve language names, exercise instructions, and UI labels. Translate hints and challenge context only when the user explicitly requests translation; do not translate answer choices or input prompts.
This is Google Docs. Preserve document formatting, comments, and collaboration UI. Do not translate automatically; only translate when explicitly requested by the user.
This is Figma. Preserve design layer names, property values, color codes, and component names. Do not translate automatically; only translate comments or annotations when requested.
This is Canva. Preserve design element text, brand names, template names, and pricing info. Do not translate automatically; only translate when explicitly requested by the user.

This is Steam. Preserve game titles, developer/publisher names, system requirements, prices, discounts, and user handles. Translate game descriptions, news, and reviews only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is the Epic Games Store. Preserve game titles, developer names, prices, editions, and platform labels. Translate game descriptions and reviews only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is Twitch. Preserve usernames, emotes, commands, URLs, and stream titles. Translate chat messages and stream info only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is IGN. Preserve game titles, platform names, reviewer names, scores, and video titles. Translate article and review prose only.
This is Bloomberg. Preserve company names, ticker symbols, prices, market data, and journalist names. Translate article prose only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is The Wall Street Journal. Preserve company names, ticker symbols, prices, and journalist names. Translate article prose only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is CNBC. Preserve company names, ticker symbols, prices, market data, and video metadata. Translate article prose only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is Investopedia. Preserve financial terms, company names, ticker symbols, and formulas. Translate educational article prose only.
This is Booking.com. Preserve hotel names, addresses, room types, prices, ratings, and availability. Translate property descriptions and reviews only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is Airbnb. Preserve listing titles, host names, amenities, prices, ratings, and house rules. Translate listing descriptions and reviews only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is TripAdvisor. Preserve attraction/restaurant names, locations, prices, ratings, and reviewer usernames. Translate reviews and descriptions only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is Expedia. Preserve hotel/flight/car names, prices, rates, booking options, and loyalty info. Translate property descriptions and reviews only when the user explicitly requests translation.

This is Skyscanner. Preserve airline names, flight numbers, airport codes, hotel names, prices, and booking details. Translate agent details and reviews only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is developer documentation. Preserve API names, function signatures, CLI commands, version numbers, config keys, code identifiers, and file paths. Translate prose explanations only.
This is a science/technology/games news site. Preserve product names, company names, model numbers, prices, reviewer names, and platform-specific terms. Translate the article body only.
This is a sports site. Preserve team names, player names, leagues, scores, statistics, betting odds, and timestamps. Translate match reports, news, and analysis only.

This is a music or podcast platform. Preserve artist names, track titles, album names, podcast titles, episode numbers, and timestamps. Translate descriptions and bios only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is a government or public-service site. Preserve agency names, legal citations, form names, dates, official terminology, and URLs. Translate explanatory prose only.
This is an academic journal or preprint site. Preserve author names, affiliations, journal names, DOI, technical terms, formulas, and citations. Translate abstracts and article prose only.
This is a reference or encyclopedia site. Preserve proper nouns, historical dates, place names, scientific names, and citations. Translate educational prose only.
This is a recipe/food site. Preserve ingredient names, quantities, temperatures, cooking times, equipment names, and author names. Translate instructions and descriptions only.
This is health or medical content. Preserve medical terms, drug names, dosages, warnings, symptoms, and official organization names. Be accurate and do not alter safety-critical information.
This is an automotive site. Preserve make/model names, trim levels, VIN, prices, specs, and dealer info. Translate descriptions and reviews only when the user explicitly requests translation.

This is a real-estate site. Preserve addresses, prices, square footage, bedroom/bath counts, agent names, and MLS IDs. Translate listing descriptions only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is a weather site. Preserve location names, temperature units, wind speeds, precipitation values, and weather alerts. Translate forecast summaries and articles only.
This is a fashion or lifestyle publication. Preserve brand names, designer names, product names, event names, and publication names. Translate editorial content only.

This is a travel booking or metasearch site. Preserve hotel/airline names, prices, booking details, and loyalty info. Translate descriptions and reviews only when the user explicitly requests translation.

This is a job or freelance marketplace. Preserve company names, job titles, salaries, locations, and application buttons. Translate job/gig descriptions only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is a photography or art portfolio platform. Preserve artist names, titles, licenses, and tags. Translate descriptions and captions only when the user explicitly requests translation.
This is a community forum. Preserve usernames, badges, timestamps, code blocks, URLs, and platform terms. Translate topic titles and post content only.
This is a coding challenge or learning platform. Preserve code, function signatures, input/output examples, and test cases. Translate problem descriptions and instructions only.
This is a workspace/documentation platform. Preserve page titles, database properties, and structured data. Do not translate automatically without user action.
